title: Kuwait Detained Journalist After Comments on Iran War Images, Watchdog Says
summary_full: The country has not commented publicly about Ahmed Shihab-Eldin, who the Committee to Protect Journalists said had been charged with spreading false information.
summary_public: The country has not commented publicly about Ahmed Shihab-Eldin, who the Committee to Protect Journalists said had been charged with spreading false information.
